title: Taste or smell change

examination.text: Supports recording acute-COVID history, current and previous symptom nature, severity, timing, duration, comorbidity, physical, cognitive, psychological, psychiatric and functional impact, and patient concerns without predicting course or generating management.
examination.rationale: Relevant to clinician-recorded symptom nature, timing, severity, comorbidity and function in post-COVID review without establishing cause or management.
examination.evidence_extract: Supports recording acute-COVID history, current and previous symptom nature, severity, timing, duration, comorbidity, physical, cognitive, psychological, psychiatric and functional impact, and patient concerns without predicting course or generating management.

source.title: COVID-19 rapid guideline: managing the long-term effects of COVID-19

follow_up.text: Supports clinician documentation of suspected or confirmed acute-COVID context, symptom duration from four weeks, fluctuating symptoms, initial consultation, functional change, further-assessment need and selected follow-up context without establishing diagnosis automatically.
follow_up.rationale: Relevant only when suspected or confirmed acute-COVID history and the duration threshold are entered; it cannot attribute a generic sensory change to COVID.
follow_up.evidence_extract: Supports clinician documentation of suspected or confirmed acute-COVID context, symptom duration from four weeks, fluctuating symptoms, initial consultation, functional change, further-assessment need and selected follow-up context without establishing diagnosis automatically.

source.title: COVID-19 rapid guideline: managing the long-term effects of COVID-19

source_limitations: All item-level mappings remain unsupported pending separate clinician review and signed approval.
Modality, onset, duration, COVID or other infection, nasal disease, trauma, medicines, neurological signs, oral status and nutrition are absent.
No COVID attribution, diagnosis, test, treatment, smell training, referral or urgency is generated.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
